MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Jan-22-2016 Vacated

Notice Of Motion And Motion By Defendants And Crosscomplainants To Compel Initial And Further Responses And Documents, And For Monetary Sanctions; Declaration Of David Lavine; Separate Statement; [Proposed] Order
Off Calendar Nov-30-2015 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling. DEFENDANTS NG AND LUO ENTERPRISES, INC., JESSICA LUO, AND JASON LUO'S Motion To Compel Initial And Further Responses And Documents, And For Monetary Sanctions is taken off calendar. On November 24, 2015, parties filed a Notice of Settlement of Entire Case. Judge Pro Tem: Charles Geerhart, Clerk: Sean Kane, Not Reported. (302/JPT)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-16-2015 Set For Trial On Jan-25-16 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
